pr.title: Non-Record: Training on the Apple Neural Engine

output.summary: Reverse-engineered ANE dispatch runs GolfWide matmuls/backward activations on the Apple Neural Engine while CPU handles grads and optimizer updates.
techniques: Reverse-engineered private ANE APIs for transformer matmul and activation-derivative offload
GolfWide 9L dim512 SwiGLU stack with DeepNet residual scaling
Sliding-window eval with stride 64 via reusable artifact
